## What & why

## Type of change

- [ ] New / updated request or assertions
- [ ] New / updated data file (CSV / JSON)
- [ ] Environment or config change
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other:

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (all `pm.test` assertions green)
- [ ] Ran the data-driven scripts if the data-driven folder or `data/*` changed
- [ ] No secrets or real hosts committed (values stay in the gitignored env file / CI secrets)
- [ ] Assertions follow one-`pm.test`-per-behaviour and parse the body with `pm.response.json()`
- [ ] README / docs updated if behaviour or commands changed
